name: Parabolic 90 Softbox with Bowens Mount
description: It has a punchy, crisp edge to lend dimension and detail to your subject and produces natural-looking catchlights in their eyes.

features.Key Features :: Silver Interior, 1- and 2-Stop Diffusers | Soft Yet Crisp Output | Fast Setup via Spring-Loaded Rod Locks | Sharp Falloff for Directional Control
features.What’s In The Box :: Nanlite Para 90 Quick-Open Softbox with Bowens Mount (35") | 1-Stop Front Diffuser | 2-Stop Front Diffuser | Bowens Mount Quick-Open Speed Ring | Carry Bag | Limited 2-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
